headline: American International Group Aligns Board With 2026 CEO Transition Plan
summary: American International Group (NYSE: AIG) has appointed Thomas Stoddard as an independent director to its board. The board change is tied to an upcoming CEO transition to Eric Andersen, scheduled for June 1, 2026. Stoddard brings experience across insurance, asset management, and investment banking to AIG's board. For investors watching NYSE: AIG, this board appointment comes at a time when large insurers continue to focus on risk management, capital allocation, and underwriting discipline...
